title: The Untold Story of the Zodiac Killer

scenes.text: A serial killer taunts police with letters, yet remains unidentified.
The Zodiac Killer operated in the San Francisco Bay Area during the late 1960s.
He claimed responsibility for five murders, sending cryptic letters to the press.
The case remains one of the most infamous and still unsolved in history.
Despite advances, the Zodiac Killer has never been caught.
scenes.label: NEVER CAUGHT

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 San Francisco, USA - 1960s. The Zodiac Killer claimed five lives and taunted police with letters, but they never caught him. Follow for daily cold cases!
